title: Apple’s Head of Home Hardware Leaves for Smart Ring Maker Oura
description: Apple Inc.’s top hardware engineering executive overseeing home devices is leaving for smart ring maker Oura Health Oy, marking a setback for a unit already contending with product delays.

title: AI Impact Is Underestimated, Oaktree's Marks Cautions
description: Oaktree Capital Management co-founder Howard Marks says the firm will remain cautious for the time being during a fireside chat with Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz at the Capital Markets Industry Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Halts Qualtrics $5.3 Billion Debt on Software Pain
description: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. halted a $5.3 billion debt deal for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. after failing to win over investors amid deepening anxiety surrounding artificial intelligence disruption.
